Uses of Class
com.irurueta.units.Acceleration

    • Uses of Acceleration in com.irurueta.units

      Methods in com.irurueta.units that return Acceleration 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      Acceleration Acceleration.addAndReturnNew​(double value, AccelerationUnit unit, AccelerationUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided acceleration value and unit and returns a new acceleration instance using provided unit.
      static Acceleration Acceleration.addAndReturnNew​(Acceleration arg1, Acceleration arg2, AccelerationUnit unit)
      Adds two acceleration instances.
      Acceleration Acceleration.addAndReturnNew​(Acceleration a, AccelerationUnit unit)
      Adds provided acceleration to current instance and returns a new acceleration.
      Acceleration Acceleration.addAndReturnNew​(java.lang.Number value, AccelerationUnit unit, AccelerationUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided acceleration value and unit and returns a new acceleration instance using provided unit.
      static Acceleration AccelerationConverter.convertAndReturnNew​(Acceleration input, AccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts an acceleration instance to requested output unit.
      Acceleration AccelerationFormatter.parse​(java.lang.String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine acceleration value and unit.
      Acceleration Acceleration.subtractAndReturnNew​(double value, AccelerationUnit unit, AccelerationUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts provided acceleration value and unit and returns a new acceleration instance using provided unit.
      static Acceleration Acceleration.subtractAndReturnNew​(Acceleration arg1, Acceleration arg2, AccelerationUnit unit)
      Subtracts two acceleration instances.
      Acceleration Acceleration.subtractAndReturnNew​(Acceleration a, AccelerationUnit unit)
      Subtracts provided acceleration to current instance and returns a new acceleration instance.
      Acceleration Acceleration.subtractAndReturnNew​(java.lang.Number value, AccelerationUnit unit, AccelerationUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts provided acceleration value and unit and returns a new acceleration instance using provided unit.
      Methods in com.irurueta.units with parameters of type Acceleration 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void Acceleration.add​(Acceleration acceleration)
      Adds provided acceleration and updates current acceleration.
      void Acceleration.add​(Acceleration a, Acceleration result)
      Adds provided acceleration and stores the result into provided acceleration.
      static void Acceleration.add​(Acceleration arg1, Acceleration arg2, Acceleration result)
      Adds two acceleration instances and stores the result into provided instance.

      Adds two acceleration instances.
      Acceleration Acceleration.addAndReturnNew​(Acceleration a, AccelerationUnit unit)
      Adds provided acceleration to current instance and returns a new acceleration.
      static void AccelerationConverter.convert​(Acceleration input, Acceleration output)
      Converts an acceleration instance to provided output acceleration unit.
      static void AccelerationConverter.convert​(Acceleration acceleration, AccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts and updated an acceleration to requested output unit.
      static void AccelerationConverter.convert​(Acceleration input, AccelerationUnit outputUnit, Acceleration result)
      Converts an acceleration to requested output unit.
      static Acceleration AccelerationConverter.convertAndReturnNew​(Acceleration input, AccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts an acceleration instance to requested output unit.
      void Acceleration.subtract​(Acceleration acceleration)
      Subtracts provided acceleration and updates current acceleration.
      void Acceleration.subtract​(Acceleration a, Acceleration result)
      Subtracts provided acceleration and stores the result into provided acceleration.
      static void Acceleration.subtract​(Acceleration arg1, Acceleration arg2, Acceleration result)
      Subtracts two acceleration instances and stores the result into provided instance.
      static Acceleration Acceleration.subtractAndReturnNew​(Acceleration arg1, Acceleration arg2, AccelerationUnit unit)
      Subtracts two acceleration instances.
      Acceleration Acceleration.subtractAndReturnNew​(Acceleration a, AccelerationUnit unit)
